mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_train_route_pair ( train_id, train_number, departure_station, arrival_station, start_time, end_time, start_region, end_region, day_diff )
VALUES
( #{item.trainId}, #{item.trainNumber}, #{item.departureStation}, #{item.arrivalStation}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.startRegion}, #{item.endRegion}, #{item.dayDiff} )
